critical_claims.claim: unsloth/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-MTP-GGUF exists on Hugging Face and provides llama.cpp and Ollama usage examples.
google/gemma-4-31B-it-qat-q4_0-gguf exists on Hugging Face, is GGUF, and is listed with Apache 2.0 license.
google/gemma-4-12B-it-qat-q4_0-gguf exists on Hugging Face and provides llama.cpp and Ollama usage examples.
RAM-based model recommendation is user-provided policy: 32GB or more recommends Qwen3.6 35B or Gemma 4 31B, below 32GB recommends Gemma 4 12B.
critical_claims.source: user prompt, 2026-06-07: "맥 램이 32기가 이상이면 ... Qwen3.6-35B ... 이거나 ... gemma-4-31B ... 미만이면 ... gemma-4-12B ... 추천"
